---
title: "Resources"
---

### AI for Economists — Two-session Workshop

- **AI for Economists — Two-session Workshop** (Spring 2026)

 Two 50-minute sessions introducing practical AI tools for economic analysis.

 - [Setup Guide](/resources/ai_for_econ/Setup-Guide.pdf)
    <!-- + Session 1 — [Session 1 materials](/resources/ai_for_econ/proj1-gmd-live-demo.html) -->

- [Session 2 — AI use in course project](/resources/ai_for_econ/proj1-gmd-live-demo.html)

- [Session 2 - Student Handout](/resources/ai_for_econ/student-ai-agent-handout.html)
